name: Literature Deep Reading
description: Bootstrap a literature deep-reading run from a source bundle, collect requested Host context, build analysis views, normalize block translations, and render the final self-contained HTML.

prompts.common: Use literature-deep-reading for source_bundle_path={{ input.source_bundle_path }}, target_language={{ parameter.target_language }}. Run `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py bootstrap --input runtime/input.json`, then read runtime/views/source-reading-view.json, source-structure.json, references-seed-view.json, target-artifacts-view.json, host-preflight-view.json, topic-candidates-view.json, concept-needs-view.json, and diagnostics-bootstrap.json. Write runtime/payloads/context-request.json using assets/schemas/context-request.schema.json, then run `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py submit-context-request --payload runtime/payloads/context-request.json` and `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py validate-context-request`. Next read the Host context views including concept-candidates-view.json and concept-needs-view.json, write runtime/payloads/reading-enrichment.json using assets/schemas/reading-enrichment.schema.json, then run `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py submit-reading-enrichment --payload runtime/payloads/reading-enrichment.json` and `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py validate-reading-enrichment`. Next read runtime/views/reading-blocks.json, source-structure.json, concept-overlay-view.json, and section-insights-view.json. Translate every translate=true block before References in target_language; delegate block batches to subagents when available, otherwise translate in smaller self-contained batches, then perform a separate main-agent review for omissions, source-copy, wrong language, terminology, Markdown/formula/table structure, and completeness. Write only the reviewed final translations to runtime/payloads/block-translations.json using assets/schemas/block-translations.schema.json, then run `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py submit-block-translations --payload runtime/payloads/block-translations.json` and `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py validate-block-translations`. Next read runtime/views/translation-view.json and diagnostics views, write runtime/payloads/final-review.json using assets/schemas/final-review.schema.json, then run `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py submit-final-review --payload runtime/payloads/final-review.json` and `python scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py validate-final-output`. At completion, read literature-deep-reading.result.json and output exactly one JSON object containing `__SKILL_DONE__: true` plus all business fields from that file.
